query:
-- Get all 0% margin ChannelHaus services (cost = revenue)
SELECT 
  s.id,
  s.serviceId,
  s.planName,
  s.customerName,
  s.customerExternalId,
  s.monthlyCost,
  s.monthlyRevenue,
  LEFT(s.discoveryNotes, 200) as notes
FROM services s
WHERE s.supplierName = 'ChannelHaus'
  AND s.monthlyCost = s.monthlyRevenue
  AND s.monthlyCost > 0
ORDER BY s.customerName, s.planName;
command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway04.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user dgdAH8nVC5Tv7xw.94a9498ba7da --database SkibUwiSvPndpvTSJv52KC --execute 
-- Get all 0% margin ChannelHaus services (cost = revenue)
SELECT 
  s.id,
  s.serviceId,
  s.planName,
  s.customerName,
  s.customerExternalId,
  s.monthlyCost,
  s.monthlyRevenue,
  LEFT(s.discoveryNotes, 200) as notes
FROM services s
WHERE s.supplierName = 'ChannelHaus'
  AND s.monthlyCost = s.monthlyRevenue
  AND s.monthlyCost > 0
ORDER BY s.customerName, s.planName;
